source: Generated by ChatGPT for an educational RAG demo.
description: Fictional grocery delivery customer support policy file used as the retrieval source for the RAG demo.

policies.title: Late delivery refund
policies.content: If a grocery order arrives more than 30 minutes after the confirmed delivery window, GreenCart refunds the delivery fee. If chilled or frozen items arrive unsafe because of the delay, the customer may request replacement, store credit, or item refund.
policies.answer: Yes. If your order arrives more than 30 minutes after the confirmed delivery window, GreenCart refunds the delivery fee. If chilled or frozen items are unsafe because of the delay, you can request a replacement, store credit, or item refund.

policies.title: Delivery window changes
policies.content: Customers can reschedule a delivery window up to 2 hours before the window starts. If the order is already assigned to a driver, support can request a change but cannot guarantee it.
policies.answer: You can reschedule your delivery window up to 2 hours before it starts. If a driver has already been assigned, support can request the change, but it is not guaranteed.

policies.title: Changing delivery address
policies.content: Customers can change the delivery address up to 2 hours before the delivery window starts. After that, support can update the address only if the driver has not started the route.
policies.answer: You can change your delivery address up to 2 hours before the delivery window starts. After that, support can only update it if the driver has not started the route.

policies.title: Frozen and chilled food handling
policies.content: Frozen and chilled items are packed in insulated bags with cooling packs. Drivers should deliver temperature-sensitive items first when possible. Customers should contact support within 2 hours if frozen or chilled food arrives warm.
policies.answer: GreenCart uses insulated bags and cooling packs for frozen and chilled items. If temperature-sensitive food arrives warm, contact support within 2 hours so the issue can be reviewed.

policies.title: Damaged or unsafe food
policies.content: Customers should not consume food that appears spoiled, opened, leaking, or unsafe. Support may issue a refund, replacement, or store credit when the customer reports the issue with a photo within 24 hours.
policies.answer: Do not consume food that appears spoiled, opened, leaking, or unsafe. Report it with a photo within 24 hours, and support may issue a refund, replacement, or store credit.

policies.title: Missing item refund
policies.content: When an item is missing from a delivered order, the customer can choose a refund, store credit, or replacement in the next available delivery slot. Missing item reports should be made within 24 hours of delivery.
policies.answer: If an item is missing, you can choose a refund, store credit, or replacement in the next available delivery slot. Please report missing items within 24 hours of delivery.

policies.title: Wrong item delivered
policies.content: If a customer receives the wrong item, GreenCart offers a refund, store credit, or replacement. The customer may be asked to provide a photo of the wrong item and report the issue within 24 hours.
policies.answer: If you receive the wrong item, GreenCart can offer a refund, store credit, or replacement. You may need to provide a photo and report the issue within 24 hours.

policies.title: Order cancellation
policies.content: Orders can be cancelled for a full refund until a shopper starts picking the items. Once shopping starts, cancellation may still be possible, but fresh prepared items and special requests may not be refundable.
policies.answer: You can cancel for a full refund until a shopper starts picking your items. After shopping starts, cancellation may still be possible, but fresh prepared items and special requests may not be refundable.

policies.title: Item substitutions
policies.content: If an ordered item is unavailable, the shopper may choose an approved substitute. Customers can reject substitutions in the app before checkout or request a refund after delivery if the substitute is not acceptable.
policies.answer: If an item is unavailable, the shopper may choose an approved substitute. You can reject substitutions before checkout or request a refund after delivery if the substitute is not acceptable.

policies.title: Payment failures
policies.content: If payment fails, the order is placed on hold and the customer is asked to update the payment method. GreenCart does not start shopping until payment is authorized.
policies.answer: If payment fails, your order is placed on hold until you update the payment method. Shopping does not start until payment is authorized.

policies.title: Refund processing time
policies.content: If a customer asks how long a refund takes or how many business days refund processing requires, approved refunds are submitted immediately by GreenCart. Banks and card providers usually take 3 to 7 business days to return the money to the customer account.
policies.answer: GreenCart submits approved refunds immediately, but banks and card providers usually take 3 to 7 business days to return the money to your account.

policies.title: Delivery pass benefits
policies.content: GreenCart Delivery Pass members receive free standard delivery on eligible orders above 35 euros. The pass does not cover express delivery surcharges, small basket fees, or special handling fees.
policies.answer: Delivery Pass members get free standard delivery on eligible orders above 35 euros. It does not cover express delivery surcharges, small basket fees, or special handling fees.

policies.title: Support escalation
policies.content: Support agents should escalate cases involving food safety, repeated failed deliveries, payment errors, account security, legal complaints, or refund requests above 75 euros to a senior support specialist.
policies.answer: Cases involving food safety, repeated failed deliveries, payment errors, account security, legal complaints, or refunds above 75 euros should be escalated to a senior support specialist.

policies.title: Account security
policies.content: Customers who suspect unauthorized account access, a hacked account, or suspicious login activity should reset their password immediately and contact support. Support can log out active sessions and escalate suspicious payment activity.
policies.answer: If you suspect unauthorized account access, a hacked account, or suspicious login activity, reset your password immediately and contact support. Support can log out active sessions and escalate suspicious payment activity.

policies.title: Driver cannot reach customer
policies.content: If a driver cannot reach the customer, the driver waits 5 minutes and attempts phone or app contact. If the customer remains unreachable, the order may be returned or marked as failed delivery.
policies.answer: If the driver cannot reach you, they wait 5 minutes and try phone or app contact. If you remain unreachable, the order may be returned or marked as a failed delivery.

policies.title: Returning non-food items
policies.content: Sealed non-food items can be returned within 14 days if they are unused and in original packaging. Perishable food, opened hygiene products, and custom items cannot be returned.
policies.answer: Sealed non-food items can be returned within 14 days if unused and in original packaging. Perishable food, opened hygiene products, and custom items cannot be returned.
